response.original_title: Mission Sommermärchen - Deutschlands Weg zur WM 2006
response.overview: Before the 2006 World Cup, German football is on the precipice. Jürgen Klins-mann's revolution threatens to fail - until his young team electrifies the country and the summer fairy tale
